title: Extremely Simple Camera Effects
description: An extremely simple shader that adds extremely simple camera effects, while still playable in normal gameplay.
body:
An extremely simple camera-effect shader.
Designed to mimic the appearance of old cameras, vintage photographs, black-and-white images, or VHS recordings.
(Mimic, that is, not entirely replicate.)

### Current Features:
- Chromatic Aberration
- Animated Noise
- Scan Lines
- Black and White
- Vignette
- Flickering
- Pixelate
- Grain Artifact
- Desaturation
- VHS wave/distortion
- Random Lines
- Image Quality Changer
- Auto exposure
- Sharpness
- And more!

### Notes
- The shader has been tested on Iris and Optifine, but I'd prefer Iris.
- If you just loaded the shaderpack and everything looks like vomit, go to the shader settings and select a profile, any profile.
- I have been made aware of [this site](https://minecraft-inside.ru/shaders/180251-extremely-simple-camera-effects.html), which is currently distributing the shader without my permission. Remember, **this is the only official site for downloading this shader**.
